title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang auctions for nearly US$1 million
description: NEW YORK: A black leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang sold for US$960,000 at a New York auction on Friday (Jul 17), 16 times higher than its estimated value of US$60,000, according to Sotheby's.
